pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh which copies the source FITS file to this exact path.
Verified from instructions.txt generated in setup_task.sh and checked implicitly by verifier.py logic.
Verified from verifier.py which uses min_stars=5 to calculate the score.
Verified from verifier.py which uses ellipticity_tol=0.08 to test if the reported average ellipticity is within bounds of the ground truth.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires measuring the ellipticity of at least 5 stars in a real VLT (Messier 12) FITS image downloaded from ESA Hubble to assess telescope tracking quality. The target image is placed at /home/ga/AstroImages/tracking_assessment/m12_Vcomb.fits. The agent must create a tracking report at /home/ga/AstroImages/measurements/tracking_quality_report.txt. The true median ellipticity of the stars is ~0.040, corresponding to a 'GOOD' tracking quality, and the verifier accepts answers within a tolerance of 0.08.
